pi_items.source: Confirmed in setup_task.sh which seeds an employee record with first name 'James'.
Confirmed in setup_task.sh which seeds an employee record with last name 'Carter'.
Confirmed in setup_task.sh which explicitly downloads to this file path.
Confirmed in setup_task.sh which seeds an employee record with first name 'Linda'.
Confirmed in setup_task.sh which seeds an employee record with last name 'Chen'.
Confirmed in setup_task.sh which explicitly downloads to this file path.
Confirmed via downloading the source photos from randomuser.me: James' photo is 5242 bytes and Linda's photo is 3539 bytes, both exceeding the 2000-byte threshold.

privileged_info_summary: The environment seeds two synthetic employee profiles in OrangeHRM: James Carter (EMP090) and Linda Chen (EMP091). Their profile pictures are downloaded from randomuser.me to '/home/ga/Documents/Photos/james_carter.jpg' (5242 bytes) and '/home/ga/Documents/Photos/linda_chen.jpg' (3539 bytes). Both downloaded image files satisfy the 2000-byte minimum size threshold specified in the metadata.
